There was a faint smell of smoke in the corridors at times in our room The price of breakfast   Very comfortable hotel in a good location with lovely staff The warm cookie upon arrival was a lovely treat too
Nothing  Friendly staff The Marco Pierre White restaurant was fantastic Room service was very quick and the food tasted great the bar area is great with friendly staff
Staff were consistently exceptional in their service bed comfortable room and bathroom spotless great breakfast in executive lounge could not have asked for more I always feel valued when I stay here

It was very very warm Tried to use aircon but you turned it cool for it to hit a temp and it then increase again My 28 week pregnant wife and I must have seen every hour throughout the night We gave in at 6am and put the tv on   Location

No parking There is parking a 7 minute walk away but in the rain and with a case that was exceptionally annoying   Daniella on reception was amazing So professional and ready to help in any way she could She even phoned me on my mobile to check if I had found the car park ok

No left luggage service It is the reason for security I understand but it was a bit inconvenient However King s cross station has this service Don t worry   Great location It is King s cross station and Angel station nearby It was very convenient And everything was clean

Location from centre cost in taxis hotel was pricey stayed in better accommodating hotels for less money Only one bath robe Rubbish window view   Free cookies on arrival friendly staff bath and shower bath robe good bar and general food menu

The fact we had to keep getting our room keys re programmed to use them was an inconvenience Unable to barely order anything from the bar menu on our return at night snack wise Plus we didn t receive our free cookie on arrival   The lounge and executive lounge Bedrooms ample and comfortable

The price   Very good hotel in a good position at 5 min walk to angel station and very close to a bus stop where you can catch some buses to go in a lot of point of interest The staff was very kind and helpfull and the hotel room clean If I ll come back in london I ll look certainly for this accomodation

Wifi is not working in the room We are at the last room of the floor but it works when we are at the lobby When I told the staff in the lobby they just think I dont know how to set up and refuse to check the problem and after I come down several times and she gives me a tel no to deal with it I found it too troublesome and we just live here for 2 nights thus didn t call the tel The air con always switched off automatically and in the mid nights we always felt cold and need to get up to switch on again   Bed is comfortable They allow us to keep the luggage for half day for free

The pillows The pillows caused me a great deal of stress as I would prefer a firmer pillow or at least the choice It meant I didn t have a decent night sleep either of the nights I stayed I was coming to the end of an extended business trip and returned to work the day I checked out feeling unrested   The breakfast selection was really good although quite a lot of oil in the sausages and bacon The room was very spacious with copious amounts of wardrobe space which is always appreciated As ever the staff are wonderful and always happy to help

No heating on in the room didn t get to bed until 11 30pm and the room was at freezing temp I wasn t told on arrival earlier in the day that I need to turn on the heating system in my room The maintenance man arrived and it still didn t come on until he requested his Manager to resolve the heating problem The duvet was a summer version wafer thin so I didn t sleep for 2 hours until the room heated up I had to put my coat on top of the bed because there were no spare blankets in the room We ordered bar snacks the night before which came an hour later barman under pressure and the snacks were cold My colleague found black hair in the bath and I found a long black hair on my pillow Lovely This is my second time to this hotel the last time I was sent to a room that was empty no plumbing or carpet it was being refurbished I gave their staff the benefit of the doubt and came back I didn t report a complaint This hotel is not up to the standard I expect They gave me a free breakfast which was a small compensation I was tired and exhausted from not sleeping and I had more meetings the next day before getting a flight Not happy   The warm biscuit on arrival raised my expectations but sadly it wasn t enough to compensate for the poor experience Its a pity about this hotel as it does have a good breakfast but the cleanliness and warm room should be the least anyone can expect in the height of winter Very disappointed
The air con in the room did mot work and it was very cold in the room as a result we were unable to turn up the thermostate and as a result room remained very cold
Furquan met us at reception checked us in assisted us with the booking which I the guest had gotten all wrong Furquan was excellent exceptional

Comfort was an issue Whilst the rooms are very clean and the facilities are good we were staying on a particularly cold weekend and because we were going to a show in the evening wanted to spend some time in the room in the afternoon The heating is not sufficient The staff were helpful but could do nothing to improve the system

More attention to detail when dealing with telephone requests and room service breakfasts as our order was incorrect   Staff made an attempt to help us though this was hit and miss When we booked we asked for an accessible room to accommodate on of our party On arrival the staff at the hotel appeared to know nothing about this but were able to alter our allocation to give us what we need

The bed was too high for my wife I think because it was a room designed for the disabled The hotel did not seem that crowded surely there were other rooms   The hotel was very convenient for what we wanted
Room was miles away from main recption took a good 5 10 minutes depending on what floor lift was on to go out for a smoke  Room was clean and big bed was lovely

discrepancies in the information received from different members of staff regarding the price of breakfast We were going to book for friends to join us but when I wanted to book a couple of hours later after making an enquiry about the price per head it had more than doubled We didn t bother in the end
Old furniture usually any hotel provides you with a lot of staff that you need like shaving kit shoes brushes tooth paste but it has only 2 hair lotion 2 body lotions and 2 soaps   Staff only
Breakfast was fairly limited although reasonably priced   Location was excellent nice neighborhood close to St Pancras station and only a few tube stations away from Camden Town London center etc

Bathroom had a constant running water sound Not loud but noticable but did not disrupt our stay   Beds were comfortable room was clean Executive lounge access was very good value for money complementary food and drink during our whole stay Good location Angel Underground Station is just around the corner Much cheaper than other similar hotels in the area
Room was VERY small for a double Lounge and bar area very busy probably due to other functions going on   location and suitability for our needs was very good DID NOT EAT IN THE HOTEL

The temperature control unit was difficult to understand and even when I worked out how to use it I couldn t get the room as I wanted it I was freezing the first night morning Some instructions in the room would have been good   Room was large and comfortable bathroom was good It basically met my expectations

The noise of a band practicing in the late afternoon was ghastly and reverberated through the ground floor Customer comfort was not considered A meal ordered at the bar created a discussion as to whether they were serving It would have been better if they hadn t it was not good we re both disabled so my request for a taxi was necessary But met with a booking of a private hire car and we were advised that there was a delay

Breakfast was too expensive You should eat at a cafe around the hotel There were no personal care products as mentioned in the bathroom Toilet wouldn t flush properly   Hotel was in a great location closed to Angel and King s Cross station WiFi was excellent on all the hotel areas and especially in the room The staff were very friendly Room was ok

heating wasn t working it was freezing therefore very little sleep combined with a toilet that wouldn t stop flushing The staff were excellent however and I have been offered a free upgrade for next time  staff

Not as clean as expected in bathroom Breakfast table not properly cleaned Extraordinary idea that filling up used milk bottle on table used by previous guests was ok for hygiene which it definitely isn t Chaotic at buffet breakfast Items missing utensils missing having to wait while plates and food items were fetched or prepared Uninteresting main course selection in restaurant not worthy if MPW  Very comfortable beds in larger than expected room Very friendly and extra helpful staff Restaurant very comfortable with attentive staff Laminated Menu card however resembled a greasy spoon menu We half expected it to be spattered with ketchup
For a room with three beds only enough toiletries for one  Sheet had odd stain in middle I only realised in the morning and couldn t be bothered to complain

Only a small niggle was the bed could ve been slightly bigger and an extra blanket in the wardrobe would have been nice as my husband found the duvet a bit light whereas it was fine for me Also the bathroom hand basin was too small for us   The room was lovely and quiet without generators or air conditioning making a noise which is a pet hate of mine

Bedsheets were old and frayed Shower was worse than pathetic   The staff were lovely on arrival and it looks from the outside like a reasonable modern hotel but even though I was in a renovated room it just looked and felt like a soul less second rate provincial budget hotel Comfy bed though let down by the sheets and it was a reasonable sized room

There was no option to have a blanket rather than a doona Given that this hotel is in the UK it was strange that sheets and blankets were not available Also for such an expensive hotel the breakfast did not include barista coffee i e only filter coffee   Hotel is in a good location Room was pretty standard for a large chain hotel

1 There were no personal care products pcp toothpaste toothbrush slipper razor shaving gel comb 2 The air conditioner was little bit noisy 3 Room temperature did not increase as we required 4 The room had only two bath towels the staff ought to put in a couple of extra towels in the wardrobe or bathroom 5 After all don t worry about that it was oky   1 Room size was sufficient and comfy 2 The staff were friendly interested and quick 3 You could use the internet in the room and it was successful 4 the location was in zone 1 and you can use underground where you want to go
Thought I had booked a twin it was a queen room possibly laid out as a disabled room with one bed Long queues at checkout   Accessibility of hotel from Euston

There were Xmas parties on till 1am without any prior warning I was on the 2nd floor despite requesting a higher room which has too much noise from the road and street during the night   The rooms were comfortable and the breakfast was fine

Staff entering my room in the morning when I m asleep Do they not know when you have checked out The constant noise outside my room by the cleaners in the morning didn t help they really need be be more considerate to hotel guests in my opinion Not everyone checks out at 8am   Cookies on arrival
Need could have been more comfortable and the room was very noisy a combination of a bathroom fan that never went off and proximity to the lifts   Staff were really helpful

Mix up with my room and other parties in my group at reception and check in was at 2pm but room was not ready till after that   Great size beds One reception girl in particular was very good Overall staff very welcoming

The carpet had nail tacks sticking out so easy to stab your toes when going from bedroom to bathroom Was reported to reception but wasn t fixed when we returned to room Reported again on checkout so no idea if attended to   The location is good being just a few minutes from Islington tube Quiet hotel at night so able to get good nights sleep

breakfast room was so busy noisy understaffed it would have been more relaxing to have breakfast in the baggage claim area of Heathrow airport  Staff was extremely helpful rooms are clean late check out was possible

The breakfast was stupidly expensive so we had breakfast at McDonald s We had booked a room with breakfast included but when we got the confirmation email it was a double room FOR ONE PERSON ONLY So once that was sorted we found out there was no breakfast included We were so frustrated by this point we didn t try ringing back and just had the room for a lot more money than originally shown which I m guessing is because it was now for two people not one   The hotel was not too far from the tube station It s great that you can leave your bags at the hotel before check in after check out we wish we had taken advantage of this instead we had to walk around London for a day with our suitcase We thought we d be able to leave it at Kings Cross We had a lovely meal in the restaurant Very good food

Breakfast was chaotic and badly managed No eggs or tomatoes left at 10 45 yet still 15 minutes to go Nobody checking Water for tea was lukewarm Waiter didn t bring orange juice and milk to the table on day 1 but did on day 2 Not acceptable Booked a deluxe queen room but didn t get one After a lot of hassle eventually managed to get them to agree a refund which they then forgot to deduct from the bill Also had to wait 3 hours after contracted check in time to get room at all HOPELESS   The Marco Pierre White Steakhouse is superb for dinner but not open at lunchtime

The carpet upon arrival into our room was soaked and heavily stained The shower pressure was minimal even on max The shower tub creaked alot also The beds moved easily you could not even lean on them And the room was freezing even when the heating was put up to 26   The staff were friendly The room was big and comfy Location was perfect

There was mold on the bathroom ceeling I asked for another room and got another room They told me it was an upgrade for the mold but it was the same size room the gave me discount for the room and free 4 drinks and breakfast Sorry it was not enough I did not feel well for some time after sleeping in the room A hotel should not rent out rooms like this   Breakfast was ok

Whilst when we arrived friday evening we got a disabled room because no other were left apparently we were a bit disappointed However Filippo working at reception was very responsive and helpful the morning after we got a much better room The breakfast was great too

Cooked breakfast wasn t great Bacon undercooked fried eggs over cooked   Great location for Islington and also Euston Station Really nice room Very comfortable bed and lovely soft pillows Continental breakfast choice good

There are both newly remodeled and older rooms at this hotel We stayed in both and found that the older room was a bit worn but okay   We enjoyed having access to the executive lounge It was worth the extra cost The breakfast and evening snacks served there were tasty and generous

The card in the bathroom mentioned a lot of complimentary items such as razor shaving gel comb etc however we never saw them in the bathroom this was not a major problem since we had our stuff with us anyway yet I wonder why the management offered something when they didn t provide it The room had only two bath towels which is a bit difficult to deal with when one of the guests has long hair and thus needs two towels herself The management really ought to put in a couple of extra towels in the wardrobe   The hotel is close enough but not too close to Kings Cross and the Euston Road artery You can be in central London Russel Square Victoria station Covent Garden etc within 20 30 mins on the Northern line and the buses I agree that they are slower nevertheless they are more comfortable since you don t have to breathe in the bottled air and stand in a crowded tube can take you there too Angel has excellent cafes pubs and restaurants We had all the meals there There are many shops and the normal brands of supermarket and a proper market Chapel Street St Mary s and St Silas s churches and Sadlers well theatre are nearby Buses 207 73 and 30 stop right next to the hotel Angel tube is a few minutes walk away Check in and check out were smooth The room was spacious for London clean and tidy and the soundproofing was excellent Proper controllable AC was present in the room Excellent staff gave us all the time when we took a extra time to check out They also have 24 hour manned front desk we came back in the wee hours of the morning D
Booked for a triple but only toiletries for 2 on first night although extra towel found in wardrobe  Location good and easy access to the tube Hotel prices reasonable and staff very pleasant

Although the cookie on arrival was nice I would have liked some biscuits on the tea coffee tray in the room to have in the morning   All the staff were particularly nice and helpful The cookie on arrival is a welcome touch
Nothing they can help it s just a chain hotel that doesn t have a soul  A convenient place to stay in Islington not too far from the underground There s also a good bar around the corner

The bed was comfortable but the pillows were too soft and offered no support Asked for additional pillows which arrived the same day but could ve done with being firmer   Staff were friendly and responsive Rooms were clean and tidy Food at Marco Pierre White s Steakhouse was excellent Close to underground Angel and not too far from Kings Cross Station

We were going to a concert in Islington so this was an ideal hotel Very close to Angel tube station Nice large room with comfortable beds with good sized bathroom Good staff at reception friendly and efficient Ideal for a stop over in London
Great location Lovely clean and comfortable room Staff very helpful Quiet at night which was great for my 4 and 1 year old children Would definitely stay here again

Feather pillows and duvet When asked for all to be changed due to an allergy only one bed changed not both had to ask again however was done quickly   Great breakfast Comfortable room Friendly staff 2 minutes walk from Angel tube station
There was not really anything we didn t like   Warm friendly atmosphere as we arrived Helpful staff and excellent location for main centre and Islington itself Rom clean and bed very comfortable

Taxi driver missed the entrance and took a while to get back round to it but that s the worst thing I can think of  Everything as good as you d expect

Rooms are incredibly small we got a triple room that was a single bed plus another bed of half size of a king bad really small for 2 adult to sleep I have booked based of the website wichc state triple room and thinking that the space was enough I would have mind spend a little more but 400 pound for 3 night and what we get is very much on the poor side No wonder when we check out nobody at the front desk dare to ask any question of our stay  Excellent location
Not enough towels and toiletries left for three people in triple room Had to request for more  Location was great Overall a pleasant stay Breakfast was very good
Excellent We were initially given a room without a bath but when we rang reception they changed our room no problem Staff were all exceptionally friendly

This is such a handy position to be in Islington is full of trendy bars and restaurants and some quirky shops The station is a short walk and buses run regularly With an Oyster card it is incredibly handy Could not fault this accommodation

Nothing If you want a better room i e larger with a view I expect you ll need to upgrade   Very comfortable bed although a small room on the bookings com discount offer but we only needed a bed for one night so no problem with this Great location for Angel City Central London Shoreditch etc
Couldn t reach room service on any of the numbers   Staff were very friendly and helpful The welcome cookie was delicious Clean and comfortable

I didn t dislike anything the towel ring fell off the bathroom wall when I put the towel back I reported this and it was sorted out straight away excellent service   The location the cleanliness and the comfortable bed Staff were polite and efficient No complaint at all

far from the center pay more than what hotel rate   Clean comfort far from attractive region does not have shower cap ex as other hotels

Literally nothing so i ll pick on the easiest thing the price if it was cheaper my smile would be bigger   Warm welcome free upgrades leant us an umbrella in the rain

I liked everything   Ricardo originally from Portugal was the concierge who greeted us and helped us throughout the stay He made the experience so much better and welcomed He gave us recommendations on places to eat and visit and told us about how London compares to other cities Every night we d get back to the hotel looking to see if Ricardo was working The important aspect of it is that we d have honest two way communication It felt as if I was catching up with an old friend who wanted me to have the best experience while in London

Bathroom requisites that weren t available from the maids eg shaving kit shower gel sewing kit etc all stated as being provided on a card in our room Did report to reception who kindly offered a beverage from the bar but we were leaving to connect to our transport Everyone was friendly and our stay very comfortable and convenient Thank you

Nothing could have been better   The staff were amazing always happy to help Not too far away from the tube and a bus stop round the corner Roof top bar next door We will definitely stay here again

Nothing  Everything about this hotel was excellent from the moment we arrived Friendly courteous staff couldn t have asked for better Will definitely stay here again
Having to hand in your key when leaving Once there was nobody around to give it back on our return so we nicked it from behind the counter   Comfy bed

Noise I really hate being able to hear someone else being in the toilet in the next room Decor I have to say was a bit tired   My double room was spacious and bed comfy Love having an iron and board in a room
The area was good for us for proximity to St Pancras but might not be ideal for all tourists   Breakfast was good Beds were good Solid functionality of rooms and contents

Full_Review: Room faced into rear of property and noise from air conditioning unit outside was a little disturbing Would be a problem if window was open throughout the night   Great location for theatres and shops around Covent Garden Quiet area opposite the park of Lincolns Inn Fields Plenty of restaurants and bars within easy reach Room was a compact however more than adequate space for an overnight stay Nice to have unlimited chilled water on tap from stations located in corridors

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: I booked two rooms and did all the booking and was the lead name on the booking however the other party were upgraded rather than the one I was in If you couldn t upgrade both then neither should have been upgraded as we were travelling together  Good location reasonably priced breakfast Spacious room

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Nothing All was great   Great service and staff good location The room was well set and quite large considering London standards Everything was perfect wish we could have stayed longer

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: There s nothing special or exciting that I would single out Basically everything was OK Room was clean room temperature was ok basic room amenities were available Wi fi signal was great Normal hotel at great location

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Comfy bed Liked the filtered water machine Good deal on secure underground parking a few minutes away Quiet location overlooking a leafy park Very handy for tube and Covent Garden

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Bed was a little soft for us  Location was great and within walking distance of all theatres and covent garden which was great Good restaurants very close by Hotel had nice small touches like bottled water to take out with you and coffee and biscuits in reception Cupboard to get more pillows or extra tea coffee

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Poor sound proofing in the room Room s temperature control not working properly  Room comes with kitchenette quite location yet so close to many London s attractions unlimited complimentary refreshments mineral water snacks fruits coffee tea

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: When I check in I thought I already made a payment through booking com when I booked it but it was my mistake and I needed to pay at the hotel The male staff was a bit arrogant to saying this which wasn t what I expect from a four star hotel But maybe he was more straightforward and this is a business hotel and that s normal But other than that all staff were nice And because of this is a business hotel no room has a bath tub only a shower I asked at the reception   The location is perfect It s only a few minutes walk from Holborn tube station but in a quiet side Everywhere in this hotel was very clean and well cared Like other reviewers wrote you can get free water tea coffee something to eat snack biscuits fruit depends on time of the day in the lobby which I found was bonus

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The air conditioning didn t work which made the room uncomfortable sleeping at night Might not stay over the summer months due to this issue   The restaurant connected to the hotel The coffee station in the lobby water dispenser and helpful staff

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Nothing All great for us   Accommodation was excellent facilities just lovely and the extra touch with the water bottle facility just perfect We were over because we had a function at the Hunterian Museum just a few minutes walk so all very perfect

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Brief wait for room at check in because it wasn t ready but receptionist was polite and said we could wait in the lounge and help ourselves to food and drink so it wasn t an issue  Complementary food and drink was good

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The complimentary tea coffee etc available 24 hours in main reception even though there are tea and coffee making facilities in your room Rooms clean and beds comfortable Great location minutes away from Covent Garden and Leicester Square Would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The accommodations were clean and well appointed The bed and pillow were comfortable Our room was overlooking the street but did not find it noisy at all Staff helpful and pleasant

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Nothing   Excellent location overlooking the park Beautiful quiet terrace to sit out for coffee or breakfast Only a 3 minute walk into the hustle of Covent Garden Hotel is smart comfortable and very clean

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The room was very standard and could do with refurbishing The room was also very small   The outside building and lobby were very sophisticated and great location

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Lovely park opposite and convenient to Kingsway Temple LSE King s College Law river etc Comfortable bed spacious room sparkling clean Three lobby computers to print boarding passes etc Snacks available in lobby Small but nice lobby and private work rooms Continental and cooked breakfasts very good and reasonable

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Perfect location just next to Holborn stop and a short walk to Covent Garden and Soho Super friendly staff Great complimentary coffee and cookies Ubicado a 2 minutos de la parada de metro de Holborn y a un pase to de Covent Garden y el Soho El personal es amabil simo y las habitaciones m s grandes que la media londinense Buen caf y galletas gratis en recepci n

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Tendency not to replace complimentary coffee and shampoo but if you ring it is sorted quickly I might suggest giving the restaurant a miss Small gripes for an excellent place though   Great soft large bed wonderful fittings and settee and table in every room with USB charger points embedded everywhere Spotlessly clean very modern and spacious and super effective air conditioning and brilliant location

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: One of my favourite hotels I ve ever stayed in It has everything I need and plugs usb ports in all the right places The wifi was super fast as well I ll definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Our room was close to the lift we could hear some noise the room didn t have a very good view but we didn t spend that much time at the hotel so this wasn t an issue and the temperature of the room sometimes was excessively hot   Good location comfortable room recommended for families A lot of coffees and restaurants nearby good access to the metro station and buses Nice staff

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Well when we checked in the receptionist tried to upgrade us with an additional fee but we didn t agree and we found ourselves on the top floor the room was at furthest corner Maybe it I wasn t related the early situation but we felt a little bit unlucky it wasn t a big deal at all   Location location location It is very central and a bonus is the park in front of the hotel The view is very nice You can walk covent garden soho even piccadily by walk easily Rooms are comfortable and clean but there is no minibar or safe box

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The location was great The rooms were beautiful with a really comfortable bed and a good shower The area wasn t too noisy at all so able to sleep well and the staff were always very friendly and accomodating all in all a great place to stay

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Nothing much just the usual gripe about the coffee instant that I don t like   It was priced and located appropriately for where we wanted to be

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: We wanted to stay a 2nd night but the room was 50 more expensive but I guess that is just late booking for you   Great location lovely historic building Very nice clean efficient hotel

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: We were given one of the garden rooms on the ground floor at check in Your staff member who helped us highly recommended it However in the future we will avoid such rooms as it is very dark has a small window and we could not open the curtains as being on the ground floor with the lights on everyone passing by outside would be able to look into our room   Didn t get to taste the croissants but the bed was comfortable and location superb

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Small dark room with window looking on to a wall The rooms vary considerably in size and outlook   Location on Lincolns Inn and walking distance to Covent Garden Also like the outside space which is rare for a London hotel Lovely to sit and have a coffee breakfast overlooking the square Quiet green and very little traffic

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Fantastic location Quiet good restaurants close to the metro Comfortable and spacious room Super clean Nice bed and sitting area Convenient fridge and microwave

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Discretionary 12 5 charge on food and drinks bills in addition to an optional tip which was applied to the bill automatically when it was presented for payment   Complimentary tea coffee water and nibbles Speed of checking in and out Excellent central location

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The room we had this time was smaller than we had on our last visit and right opposite the lift which concerned us However the room had everything we needed and there was no noise at all from outside the room   The location is fantastic quiet but within walking distance of Covent Garden theatre land and the National and Portrait gallery Free coffee and cookies always available in the entrance are very welcome

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: I love all the personal extras the free tea coffee and biscuits The empty water bottles were great for the children and they even had an umbrella to lend for the day Had a great chilling area for our friends to come and meet us too And an amazing location

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: That we have still not heard back from anyone they have taken money don t even care  Booking com took payment upon booking the hotel bullied us into paying again when we arrived although we had already paid and still not her refunded I would not recommend anyone stay at this hotel

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Nothing really perhaps there could ve been more complimentary tea coffee milk sugar in the room   Room was very nice and spacious for London The location is great for covent garden and is very near Holburn tube station

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: There are no constructive criticisms that I can make   The Club Quarters Hotel met our needs completely Being upgraded to a suite was a nice surprise Having a print facility available was a godsend the weather was inclement and having umbrellas available was a great addition Having complimentary tea coffee and beverages at reception was excellent Storage of our luggage at check out provided us with some greatly appreciated wiggle room Having a parking facility in close proximity which was at a reasonable cost met our immediate needs The hotel staff were very helpful and we thanked them Overall we had a fabulous stay and our children enjoyed it also

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The room had a bit of smell which we only noticed when we walked in Water in the shower didn t drain away well in the shower   Spacious clean room and bathroom Free drinks and cookies at the reception Location was the best Very central but incredible quiet and peacefull because of the park It was a delight to come home to in a busy city like London

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: I had to pay 10 extra as they said the room I booked wasn t suitable for 2 adults 1 child which clearly stated on my booking request Aircon very noisy kept us awake all night it was too hot without it   Immaculate room and bathroom

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: My stay was over   The staff and coffee Your staff is what makes this place Make sure you treat them well They make all the difference from me coming back over and over again

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Booking com didn t inform the hotel that there would be 2 adults and a child staying They accommodated us but it was a bit disappointing from Booking com   Third time we ve stayed here Fabulous hotel

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The staff was not very polite except at check in Whenever I said Good morning or good evening while entering the hotel the reception staff didn t reply Also on one occasion when I asked for more details about checking out the person at the desk seemed bothered and wasn t very helpful This really surprised me and the overall impression was that they don t want guests except when cashing in   Great location rooms have a desk very convenient if you are on a business trip

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Arrived earlier than check in time and our room was ready straight away Lovely friendly staff greeted us then upgraded our room Amazing service and perfect central location can t wait to stay again

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Personally I love to have a soak in the bath before a night out on the town Also sorry but the semi opaque glass bathroom walls didn t work for me especially when the loo is already so close to the bed I like privacy   Loved the location and the view from our window a leafy London square with the city beyond it

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The receptionists insisted I have booked for two persons Thankfully I had the print out showing it was booked for two adults and a kid Generally speaking whenever is possible e g President Hotel Athens Greece the hotels staff gives you hard time when you have booked through Booking com  Clean tidy

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Nothing  Excellent location near ground station almost every district is on a walking distance lots of nearby restaurants and cafes the room is comfy there is free coffee machine near the reception friendly staff and helpful a nice reception lady gave me free early check in I highly recommend this place and needles to say I extended my stay for 3 more nights

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The fridge in the the room although very much appreciated was a little quite noisy dated could have done with up grading to a newer quieter model Just outside the Hotel unfortunately out of the hotels control the area was quite litter strewn   The staff really friendly helpful just as we rembered them from our 1st visit Like th location with everything we needed within a half hour walk from th square mile to th palace The free refreshments in reception the complimentary umbrellas the warm inviting tv lounge

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: All good  good welcome easy to book in lovely quiet area opposite a park but right in the action just 10 min walk to shaftsbury theatre 3 mins from the underground quality hotel good size room would recommend

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Pillows could be more comfortable They were way to high Maybe someone likes pillows that way but not we everything else just perfect   Very clean hotel Very good place Nice personal We got better room than we had ordered because there was not so many people that day

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Don t feel there was anything we didn t like at all   The location was quiet even though it was very central with a good view of the London skyline from hotel room we enjoyed our stay

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Room a bit small for 3 Not cleaned very well during our stay  Water dispensers complimentary refreshments at reception location friendly and helpful staff

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The location of this hotel is excellent all the restaurants shops of Covent Garden are only 5 mins walk away The tube station is 5mins walk away The room bathroom were a good size the bed was comfy All the staff were friendly helpful

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: No fridge no coffee making facility in room Room was set up for a person in a wheel chair They got the bedding wrong by putting a cot in the room when I clearly stated and asked would there be a bed for a 4 year old They assumed a cot rather than read my query we had to wait 40 minutes till they exchanged that for a fold up bed Once we were inside the room a maid came in without knocked and embraced us greatly   Location was great Appreciated that we got a good deal and thanked god that we did pay full price for the room we got

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Asked for room on ground floor due to joint problems but on arrival manager upgraded us to a bigger room next to the lift on the 5th floor which had easier facilities for me to use

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: When we arrived at the hotel one receptionist to busy and the other just talked that quick like he wanted to get rid of us  The location was very good as was bed

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: There is no hotel bar where you can retreat to finish your evening after being out in London to see a show or meal The only bar is in the basement attached to a Chinese restaurant This is the only downside for an otherwise excellent hotel   Location is fantastic for London west end but also quiet

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: I didn t like that I did not get full compliment of towels every day missing face towels most days and my coffee was replaced with decaf instead of normal preventing me from enjoying coffee on a couple of days  I like the pro active customer service at checkin and the location was excellent

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Upon arrival a member of staff was quite rude clearly didn t want to be there Needed a little smile on her face  The location was great for going to see a show

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Excellent value for money good sized room in central London staff were lovely extremely helpful and will stay here in any future trips to the capital

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Nothing well done   Ample room clean great TV Wifi great bed Clean and ample bathroom Water bottles available free of charge Exceeded my expectations

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The duvet is a little noisy would have preferred cotton duvet cover   Staff helpful and kind Facilities super easy Group of 5 of us 2 rooms throughly enjoyed our stay Good haor dryer Clean amd comfortable Space for us all TV in room great

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: At Holborn station there is some work being done on the escalators which means there is no entry during morning rush hour 7 30 10 00 am Mon Fri this work is expected to continue through 2017  Great location just 3 min from Holborn station lots of bus and train options to anywhere in London Very comfortable and good size room very quiet even though our room faced onto the main street Even though breakfast is not included in the room rate there was still fruit and muesli bars available each morning and snacks biscuits in the afternoon also lots of great breakfast options just outside the hotel

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The room we were given was a courtyard view the view didn t bother us we were out till late and checked out the next morning so we wouldnt have spent time admiring the view even if it was stunning however the room was so noisy i did not sleep much There is a constant loud noise like the sound of air conditioning running in the courtyard all night long The room window did shut with some persuasion but the double glazing does not stop the sound If you are bothered by noise make sure you ask for a room that does not look into the courtyard   The location is excellent for the west end Holborn underground is just minutes away The hotel is clean and modern and our room a queen room was spacious and well equipped We did not use the restauraunt but it did look a nice place to eat There is a snack vending machine on the lower floor with beer gin in it which is nice

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Bed wasn t too comfortable but t hat could be down to personal taste   Ease of check in check out Friendly reception staff Good location for theatres

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Our only disappointment was the size of a family room 3 adults when sofa bed made encroached into the room leaving a difficult route to the bathroom also we all found the pillows too hard would have been nice to have had a choice   Great location very professional staff didn t need to ask anything all the information given at check in spotlessly clean everything we needed in a family room Would definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: No bath only a shower  Free tea and coffee machine open 24 7 The toiletries they have in the bathroom Lovely powerful shower and very comfy bed

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: That my stay ended  This is so rare to find a hotel this good in the UK You d never dream that service staff and facilities are this clean comfortable usable and pleasant To my biggest surprise food and coffee were great I stay in many hotels and UK hotels for the most part are squalid places which don t even compare to the worst east European hostel This one on the other hand ranks with the best 5 star hotels in Europe Your staff bring in an exotic flair to the hotel and if anything you should treasure them give them a raise and praise them They make this place incredible and I will certainly return

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Double bed though very comfortable was too narrow for this quality of hotel   Excellent mini suite type room very well equipped modern spotless excellent quiet location and good value for money

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The 24 hour coffee and cookie station and the fact that they encourage you to help yourself to takeaway hot drinks and bottles of water even after you ve checked out Service was fantastic Perfect hotel for coming back to after the theatre Safe clean friendly and professional 12 o clock check out was useful too and we borrowed a hotel umbrella for our morning walk

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Nothing  The room had all the qualities to make our stay comfortable We particularly liked the bathroom and the table with electric sockets and USB points

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Everything a lovely hotel very close to Kingsway LSE theatres Very quiet and comfortable and extremely well equipped My room had a dining area study area and a small kitchen as well as a lovely bathroom and very comfortable bed Would happily stay again

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Manners maketh man so they say so I would have liked the gentleman who checked me in to have stopped listening to his mobile phone during the check in process Otherwise no complaints at all  Exceptionally clean room and remarkable value for money considering the hotel s location Quite a few small but useful details in the way the room is designed and arranged that make life a little easier

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: staff were quite blunt and not very welcoming shower curtain instead of a door is never good  location super free tea coffee and biscuits a nice plus great size room for central london

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: couple of members of staff were a little abrupt and not very friendly on our first morning we woke up to no hot water which wasn t great but no ones fault we were offered breakfast the next day however they didn t say it was just a continental we had to pay extra for this which I wasn t impressed not where other guest I saw   Great central location for theatres Leicester Square Covent Garden family room good with the advantage of kettle and microwave free water available anytime and free tea coffee and cookies and also free milk plenty of places to eat locally

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Bed was too firm Room was very small Hot water went cold at about 0900 when we were still showering Apparently the hot water heating system had a technical fault which was being seen to but we were checking out anyway Shower waste didn t drain proper so a pool of water was left behind   Location

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Rooms assigned a tad uncomfortable one very noisy other one with slanted ceiling and could stand up straight Careful with lack of privacy between room and bathroom no door just a sliding glass not see through though   Rooms were very clean and beds very comfortable Location was fantastic and the biscuits and water available for guest were a great addition Would go back

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Nothing  This is our second visit here and is as good as the first Great location clean and comfortable with welcoming staff Will definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: We loved this place Great location in the theatre district lovely staff a nice snack drink bar in the lobby a warm and inviting lobby bottles of water that were complementary in the lobby and on each floor We felt that the security was top notch since key cards were needed to get into to the building and to run the elevators Clean and comfy room with a nice tv and free wifi Every type of cuisine was right around the corner and we were close enough to our show to walk to the theatre

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Nothing  Staff were very accommodating We extended our stay by one night and our bags etc were all moved to our new room without any fuss New room was classified as standard but was very comfortable and more than adequate Really like what Club Quarters offers

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: At first we thought room was great but during the night we realised it wasn t All night we could hear what sounded like a cistern filling up This would repeat every few minutes and sounded awful We were in room 521 so if given this room then refuse to take it and ask for another Shame as rest of hotel was 10 10   Great location Easy check in Warm welcome Free beverages in lobby which was handy as when you left hotel on cold morning it was great to have a hot coffee to take with you Room was a good size and very clean Staff were friendly and helpful Security good too No access to lifts without room card

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: NONE  everything they took care about every single detail usb cables exfoliating soaps free drinking filtered water free snacks plus coffee a good quality coffee not a cheep one the room wasn t that big but well designed and suuuuper smaaaart the gym was amazing also two super markets around the corner pret a manager and cafe nero are 2 minuts away this was my 4th visit to london and club quarters is the best place i ve stayed in 3 p s adding tooth brush to the toiletry would be great

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The sheets could have been a little cleaner   They had a little coffee and tea bar at the lounge area I got steamed milk at 3am in the morning Cannot be happier

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Surprisingly hot for December We needed to put the air conditioning on as the heating was a little stifling   Clean modern comfortable spacious Welcoming staff

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Nice size room and location was excellent very peaceful near the Theatre in Covent Garden easy smooth checkin on arrival free coffee and cookies in reception

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The pillows were a bit overfull for me  Free chilled water refills Very quiet rooms even though the hotel is in a very busy area Staff were very friendly and helpful Lovely welcoming and cosy feel The curried egg spring rolls and Peking Duck BAO were sensational The sliding table was really useful and there were plenty of plugs etc

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Breakfast to expensive Could not justify the cost to feed my family Wetherspoons around the corner full breakfast fir 4 89  Superb hotel and great value for money Location for the West End bars and restaurants literally on the doorstep

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Position was excellent for theatres and shopping we walked to most places Hotel room quiet no traffic noise Very clean Easy efficient check in and out Efficient bag storage available

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The room is a bit tight for 3 No safe provided   Complimentary snacks and coffee tea facilities available at lobby There are also drinking water facilities on all floors Staff are friendly and helpful There are many eateries and supermarkets nearby About 15 mins walk to Oxford St Short walk from Holborn station just have to note that sometimes the station is not available during peak hour to go to Kings Cross We had to walk to Russell Square station The sofa bed is comfy

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: My only minor issues were the difficulty of finding the restaurant for breakfast and the fact that the chef put the butter pat next to hot food on my breakfast plate so that the butter was inedible These are obviously first world problems and not to be taken too seriously   We stayed for one night at this hotel to enable us to see an opera at Covent Garden and not have the hassle of travelling home immediately afterwards The hotel was quiet and perfectly located within a short walking distance of both the opera house and other theatres for that matter and the Sir John Soanes museum The room was relatively spacious the free coffee tea and wifi welcome and the breakfast menu good

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Only issue with this hotel is the paper thin walls You can hear conversations and the TV in the next rooms   Location is great the staff are very helpful and professional Rooms are comfortable

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The ensuite had opaque glass sliding doors into the room which meant once everyone went to sleep going to the loo light and noise disturbed everyone  Staff were very friendly and informative and the location of the hotel was excellent especially if going to the theatre

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Honestly can t think of anything  Location superb great base for shopping shows londons tourist sights Liked having water machine bottles on the corridor Coffee facilities were good downstairs

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Nou so sure about this one maybe an extra towel hook in the bathroom What I would have liked is an in room safe There is a very secure central double keyed safe keeping facility available which is better than the in room safes Some but not all rooms mine being one have safes It is possible on request to have an iron delivered also even a microwave oven   Location is great Close to well everything yet in a relative quiet area Easy check in and a quick check out GREAT internet connection Double double isolated windows first I ve seen in London Electrical plugs in all the right places and enough of those Light swithches absolutly logical AC works Hot well pressured water in shower There is a washbasin plug that actually works Room layout is perfect for my needs Room is absolute great for a traveler business or tourist Great bar and restaurant on premises Complimentary coffee nice cosy lounge free filtered water with refill bottles Fire escapes well maintained illuminated and properly maintained Efficient functional comfortable This is my future London address

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Nothing  Loved the help yourself tea coffee cookie refreshment area in reception The seating area in the bedroom with lots of USB and plug sockets Didn t have time to try the fitness suite

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The self service checkin system didnt work for me and then I found the member of staff patronising I got a sense that this member of staff was a bit harassed Having only 1 member of staff working at the front desk appeared to cause problems around the service that was required Checking out was much more pleasant   Bed was very comfortable the location was perfect for my needs

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Water not working on the morning of our stay so there was a delay for showers etc whilst this was fixed however recovery was good and we were offered complimentary breakfast which was appreciated   The staff were very friendly and helpful Hotel handily placed for the west end theatres Nice to have coffee making facilities in reception

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Due to its fantastic location price is a little bit expensive but affordable   Location free coffee tea water and some cookie service Very well organized equipped room

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: I often stay in the ClubQuarters hotels and Lincoln sInn St Paul s and Gracechurch are the best of the bunch Special mention to Livia in Lincoln s Inn who is superlative and brilliant at her job always making the extra effort to take care of the little details of your stay Excellent as always

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Quite expensive   Room is lovely quite big well equipped with a very good bed there is a kettle and tea set Bathroom is nice In the hotel there is a water cooler with bottles for take away At the reception area one can have tea coffe water and some cookies Personnel are wonderful hospital helpful very friendly

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Didn t realize that when they charge your card for the room they then add 20 extra which you do get back Still waiting and hoping I don t go overdrawn because I had budgeted a certain amount  The bed was very comfy

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Breakfast Quite a confusing way of separating the breakfast and the cost for each segment It could have been much better for the guests as well as the Hotel personnel if a buffet type is available with all products and a single cost as in most hotels Reception the old traditional reception style is making us feel more comfortable when it comes to a hotel   The location was great as well as the hotel facilities Room space for the room we had was good but please note this was not the standard room which we knew that it is relatively small

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: AIRCONDITIONING ON AND OFF STAFF TRIED TO DEAL WITH IT BUT TECHNICAL PROBLEM  FANTASTIC LOCATION AND SERVICE WIFI AND TEL TOTALLY RELIABLE SO GREAT BUSINESS HOTEL

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Pillows were atrocious Would have liked a bath tub too but realise space is premium in London and would have pushed up the price   Perfect location Great friendly service

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The water pressure in the shower could have been stronger but if that s my only complaint things weren t too bad   Great location and the room was very functional

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The room was recently refurbished to a high standard but did have the New Furniture New Carpet smell that was a little overpowering on first entering   The hotel is reasonably priced on a weekend less so in the week but is ideally situated for all the London attractions 2 Min walk to Holborn tube or a 10 minute walk to Covent Garden 15 mins to Chinatown It very quiet and you cannot hear any road noise

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The restaurant It was limited and not great if you don t like Chinese food However the hotel did offer options for other takeaways which you could eat in your room   Staff and facilities were great

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Room was a bit small but it was advertised as small queen so it wasn t misleading Bathroom wasn t very private sliding doors etc and no lock  Great location quiet room as described Within Walking distance of Covent Garden Smart rooms with some business y features like dictionary and office chair in the room but still fine for a leisure stay

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Had to wait many hours to get into room upon check in Difficult access cards in elevators Lower level signs to WCs mislabeled especially troublesome for the handicapped   Helpful staff Liked the snacks downstairs Great bed

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: plastic stirrer for tea coffee in room It even bent with the heat of the water Are you having a laugh Cheapskates I didn t expect that   Hotel and room are lovely and the location is brilliant

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Safe and minibar are not available in the room but we didn t ask for it   Perfect location in walk distance to many attractions and also 2mins from tub station Modern and clean rooms part of them with wonderful view Very friendly and helpful staff Good coffee and tea available 24 hours for hotel guests

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Booked for 2 adults and a child but only got a tiny double room with no extra bed Only 1 cheap pillow each No towels for the child occupant 2 teabags and 2 tiny sachets of milk Overpriced and not what I booked   Excellant location clean with contemporary decor

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: N A  The hotel was convenient for an event we were attending It is also accessible for central London it s a short walk to Covent Garden A pleasant location overlooking Lincoln s Inn field

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Nothing really this is an establishment where what they say will be provided is and for London very competitive pricing  The staff were lovely The location is ideal for business and leisure and the rooms are of a good size have excellent ammenitites and the stations in the corridors for water or ironing boards etc work well and the free wifi works

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Bar could if stayed open later would of liked a night cap after our night out but bar closed at 12  Very comfortable bed good pillows loved the coffee cookie station

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Nothing   Great hotel in a nice quiet location on the edge of the West End Nothing is too much trouble for the staff The rooms are spacious well equipped and very clean

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: We arrived just before midday so enquired whether it was possible to check in early which it was but only with a hefty 40 surcharge the receptionist did not tell us of this amount just put it through my credit card   Ideally situated for Covent Garden and close to Central Line underground Our room was somewhere toward the back of the hotel and very quiet The hotel faces Lincolns Inn Fields a delightful green space surrounded by a road which is all but traffic free Staff were friendly and helpful Room was a reasonable size with a table and comfortable seating a sort of mini sofa around the table Excellent bathroom with spacious shower A bonus is the comfortable guests lounge just off the foyer with a modern wall mounted fireplace ample seating and complimentary tea coffee and biscuits

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: I like a coffee as soon as I wake but not enough in the room and no spoons to stir your drinks minor compared to what you can get in the lobby but I don t want to go down at 5am to get a coffee   Free coffee in the lounge area with free snacks through the day I e Fruit in the morning mixed nuts peanuts lollies or seeds in the afternoon and nachos and olives in the evening with soft drinks

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The only negative was when I came to blow dry my hair I had to stand as there was no chair to sit on also as Iam a hairdresser my hairdryer is powerful and as I was standing drying my hair the dust that flew off the top of the wardrobe was unbelievable it covered all our clothes on the bed so I don t think it had been dusted for a very long time so maybe the housekeeping needs to be addressed   The hotel was ideal for our short stay would book again ideally situated for Covent garden a very pleasant hotel

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: There is no safe in the room   Location Near Convent Garden and Leicester underground You can visit the most museums and attractions walking Silent place

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: High class comfortable hotel bang in the middle of London Polite staff clean rooms and coffee etc on tap what more could a weary traveler wish for

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Superb I won t write any more reviews of ClubQuarters I usually stay at Lincoln s Inn or St Paul s simply because I visit regularly on business and from my prior reviews you will see the excellence in staff management and service in these hotels Simply high quality

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: There was a coffee bean in front of the microwave throughout our stay It must have been there when the previous guest occupied the room It always bothered me but I was out all day so there was just no time to talk to the staff about it Honestly i just presumed hoped that it would be removed when the room would be cleaned But since that didn t happen I think the room was dirtier than it looked   They have an unlimited supply of coffee for their guests fro proper coffee machines which is amazing They kept our bag for us for a charge of 2 50 for 3 days after departure This was helpful as we were going for a trip to Scotland and carrying and extra suitcase would be strenuous Although the receptionist had first told us that it was okay to keep the suitcase but at check out the other receptionist refused to keep it On requesting the manager we could keep suitcase in the hotel at the extra charge So there is poor communication between the staff

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Breakfast isn t included but considering the hotel s location and standard of quality of decor this is not entirely unreasonable And you can book breakfast as an add on for a reasonable fee  Location Layout decor staff facilities in the room

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Glass bathroom door not at all soundproof which gave little privacy while in the bathroom The hotel was very difficult to find and didn t come up on the driver s GPS which involved us driving round and round in circles before having to get out and walk there as the road to it was closed which probably caused the GPS problem   The room was pleasant and the staff were helpful The shower was fantastic I liked the back entrance opening on to Kingsway It was only a very short walk to the Tube station

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Our room over looked the main road and was a little noisier than expected  Staff were great check out times were really good and the restaurant was really good

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: On the first day not all the toiletries were there Also the area outside the hotel was sometimes dangerous at night   The cleaning service was quick and they did a great job I also liked the complimentary water bottles fountain The wifi worked great The room was comfortable and the TV had a good selection of channels

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: I tend to stay at ClubQuarters regularly on business trips and I have to assure you of the high quality at all their establishments In particular I find Lincoln s Inn Fields as well as the St Paul s to be the very best At Lincoln s Inn the graciousness and professionalism of ALL the staff especially at reception is very impressive Usually in a hotel there are one or two people who make a special effort but at Club Quarters it seems everyone makes a special effort All the Team are on the same page and this is so excellent I was made to feel relaxed at all times and everything was done with precision grace and kindness Now this is the sign of a well managed Team Whomsoever is Managing these two establishments should be very proud indeed of all their staff the hotels and facilities I cannot find fault and I have stayed in many hotels Impressive

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The continental breakfast was pedestrian I would have really like more than one type of bread and the yoghurts were poor quality   The bed was very comfortable Free water bottles was a bonus

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Room a little small but it s London so you have to expect that   Great location in Central London close to Holborn tube and theatre district yet hidden on a quiet park area staff efficient At the right time of year the room rate can be very attractive

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: No fridges in room but do have 24 coffee tea making in foyer along with snacks etc   Great location only 250m to underground Holborn Also close to great coffee shop on corner on way to underground We got a very good deal on booking com so very good value for money No so good if you pay full price

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Bed was uncomfortable and the bedding had stains Queen room was unbelievably small but worst of all it was next to air conditioning vents in the inner yard the noise kept me up all night   WiFi was really good

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The location of this hotel was fabulous Very clean and comfortable beds Help yourself cupboard on floor to enable you to get bathroom products as required Free bottled water and snacks

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Nice location Walking distance too many sightseeings theaters and shopping Cab and public transports not far away The biggest surprise Fresh water on tap available on every floor all day Genius

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Proximity of London sights all in walking distance so great for nervous overseas tourists visiting London for 1st time Also business like friendly without being gushy manner of hotel staff Little dust which is great for asthmatics   The staff generally went the extra mile

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: A room with some space is hard to find in the centre of London The rooms in this hotel are not big but you have sufficient space and everything you need is in it and everything works Excellent location Very helpfull staff Highly recommended

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Very close to Holborn tube which was only two stops away from St Pancras Kings Cross Lovely park only across the street great for kids Bonus day rental cycles at hotel door Easy cycling for transport

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Room was unfortunately a bit too warm for this time of year and made it a bit stuffy   Great location close to underground and walking distance to a lot of London s attraction Good size modern room great bed and nice shower Quiet location

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Normal rates are high but we got good deals online   Great location 200m from underground and short walk to all the west end shows They have good front office facilities as well as handy tea coffee making facilities accompanied by changing accompanying snack choices Very helpful and knowledgable staff

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Difficult to find from the main road and with the instructions given   Very nice hotel in excellent location Staff very friendly and helpful Reasonable rates too

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Upon arrival the staff were very friendly and helpful and couldn t do enough to make our stay as pleasurable as possible As we arrived earlier then expected the staff asked us to help ourselves to tea coffee and biscuits whilst they got our room ready Best service I ve ever experienced in a hotel

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Room facing the front was a little noisy and heard guests throughout the night which kept us awake Would request a quieter room next time  Perfect location and close to amenities

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: It all felt very stretched there were faults with the air conditioning fire alarms and lifts during our stay All superbly handled by staff but it just felt like it was creaking at the edges   Great location warm welcome and spacious rooms with good wifi and business facilities

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The sliding glass toilet doors I like my privacy  Staff were lovely and the complimentary tea coffee biscuits bottled water in reception was fantastic

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Nothing  excellent location 5 mins from holborn tube station very clean and comfortable free refillable water bottles on the landing a great idea Tea and coffee in the room Very quiet area but central to everything Would deffo stay again

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The staff were so friendly and helpful Nothing was too much effort for them They were amazing The bed and pillows were super comfy best nights sleep ever A 2 minute walk away from everything

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Rooms not cleaned properly No safe or mini bar in room Tv not working room table broken No staff on front desk Lifts not working properly Lifts full of staff and therefore no room for us No toast etc brought to breakfast table   Leaving

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Not much perhaps a better breakfast option but we are splitting hairs here   Large room for London great bed HD TV comp water and tea coffee coupled with great location making it a prime choice for London visit

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Breakfast dining arrangements in the hotel aren t ideal but being so central means that it doesn t really matter   Fantastic location helpful staff and beautiful views of the park

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Parking in the week would be rather inconvenient but we could park outside on Sunday until 6 45am on Monday without paying and giving time to be clear of the congestion charge area   Its quiet location so close to the tourist mayhem of the theatre district and overlooking Lincolns Inn Fields Very good in room facilities with well equipped kitchenette

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Whilst we didn t use it the room service menu was limited   Perfectly located in a quiet area over looking the park and around the corner from Holborn Underground station Staff friendly welcoming and helpful Rooms clean and nicely decorated Liked the dark patterned duvet covers rather than the usual hospital like white that is more the norm for hotels now Great having plastic bottles and water machines on each floor as well as the complimentary hot drinks and biscuits at reception

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The bed felt as though it was tipped down at the head end and dipped in the middle so not the best nights sleep It was like they had forgotten to turn the mattress once in a while   The staff were excellent and very helpful The location is superb opposite the park but just around the corner for being right in the heart of things It s certainly a lovely hotel and a great place to stay for the theatres with easy access to most areas

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: No comments  Very good location 2 blocks from holborn station Very quite Rooms very Comfortable with small fridge Table for dinner and a nice terrace to rest after exploring the city Hotel offers compliments along the day

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Staff were really friendly when my niece made the receptionist aware that it was her 8th birthday she arranged for a hamper of goodies to be sent to the room

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The tissues were not in the bathroom and a vanity pack would have been a nice extra Room temperature was fine but the air conditioning went off automatically  The room was compact but had everything I needed and there was sufficient space for luggage and being able to move around

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Although I had left my towels on the floor they forgot to change it on one day I called the front desk and they promptly brought me clean ones   The location was excellent very close to the Holborn tube station and there were supermarkets drugstores parks and restaurants around The hotel is 5 10 minutes away from Covent Garden My room was incredibly spacious and very quiet The shower was great I didn t try the breakfast but there was a Starbucks and a Caf Nero where I could eat something cheaper

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: Although we arrived early at 12 room wasn t ready until 3 30   Everything We ll be back Free tea coffee Female receptionist very helpful

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
Full_Review: The front desk staff are very welcoming considering we stayed at other big name hotel in London during the trip They are genuinely interested in making our check in and check out effortlessly fast The location could not be any better

Hotel_Name: Club Quarters Hotel Lincoln s Inn Fields
