Bacon looked disgusting Just a pile of intertwined fat Scrambled eggs too runny Limited healthy options Didn t see yoghurts til we were leaving   There was a poor selection the hot food did not look at all appetising and the room felt quite chaotic and messy If we returned we would definitely not choose to include breakfast

We were walked in on by another guest while we were in bed Our room was rented to someone else while we were still there The guest walked in while we were still in bed The front counter fixed the room issue but we were offered a free drink at the bar There should have been at least a 50 euro credit to be used as we wanted This was highly unacceptable and is why staff was the only below rating   Breakfast food was not good Some of that is just because it is diffetent from what we are used to in US Also bar prices should be slightly less I know things are expensive in Paris but there is no reason to victimize your guests

no lifts to get from main entrance to reception floor we had a pram and we had to bring it via elevator a few times we used lift for disabled people but in order to get it working you need a staff card but there is not always staff around and you also need to go through the back doors and carpark to get to that lift Swimming pool was very outdated and cold It is also a bit of walking to the swimming pool so its not great if you have to walk with small kids as we did   Everything was spotless friendly staff great room very warm

The swimming pool and changing facilities are quite old and need updating But they did the job and the children had a swim  The staff were very friendly helpful and humourous The position of the hotel for the center of Paris is fantastic and it had parking for 29 Euro a day The room was wonderful with a fab view over the River Seine I cannot recommend this hotel enough Will definitely use it again when we go back
Very clean and tidy Hotel staff were helpful and the location is great 10 minutes walk from the Metro and Eiffel Tower Also lots of shops and restaurants a few minutes away Great stay

Toilet was in the closet whit no lock on the door and no sink on the toilet you had to go to the shower room to wash you hands after toilet business NOT hygenic I booked a room whit view over the river but when we arrived they said they uppgraded my room but they really didnt i think i booked superior whit river view and the uppgrade was to family they said but i see it as a overpayed downgrade whit perfekt view over 2 other buildings and they placed us whit view over 2 other buildings as far away from river view you can imagine And dont bother put the dont disturb sign up they come in your room anyway and do their thing Parts of the hotel really needs some renovations I dont know where the 4stars come frome I ve stayed at 3star hotells that has better standard The rooms are abit overpriced set to the standard even tho its an expensive city   Nice beds Good location Big TV but loss of connection to the eng speeking channels around every 30min

There is an issue with the bathrooms Water damage was very evident from leakage through the shower door onto the floor baseboards carpet Enough that we had to change rooms The staff was very accommodating but two other rooms had a similar issue including the room we changed to Toilet is separate from the bathroom I would recommend a hand sanitizer option you must return to the toilet off the bedroom to wash Sofa bed mattresses need replacing Springs were prominent and uncomfortable for my daughters A little more decoration e g Photos of Paris monuments or scenes would compliment the contemporary and neutral decor Not a complaint but a suggestion based on similar type properties I m used to as a business traveler TV monitor was updated but interface was slow   Exellent location to Eiffel Tower two Metro stations shopping right around the corner This also includes two grocers Mono Prix Marks Spencer a real plus for families to manage food costs and have local conveniences Staff at this hotel are very friendly professional have multi lingual skills The restaurant was satisfactory and the common areas very well maintained Security was always present in lobby area leading to escalators reception Housekeeping did a very good job and kept the amenities stocked for our family Rooms are of good quality and have reasonable features e g outlets no USB refrigerator storage etc but no iron Bathroom space is tight but not unusual to Europe Taxis que is right outside
Local rule not allowing use of Bermuda shorts in pool resulting in pool being unavailable Rule not understood and could be OK if pre communicated   Location room was comfortable

the response whenever you make a complain especially when it s the bathroom that has mildew that is just nasty   The Hotel location is awesome It s with in walking distance to any public transportation taxi bus rail etc the staff was cordial and the security that was in place through out he hotel entrances was great it gave my family a better sense of security

Property is badly managed The carpets are old and awfully smelly Service is pathetic Breakfast spread not great   The location is good The view from the room was good The concierge was helpful Wifi was excellent

The door of the bath room for showering is not good and the floor get wet every time I take the shower  The breakfast is good with the view of river side and it s close to the metro line 6 and just 8minutes walk and 12minutes walk to Eiffel tower

There was nothing we didn t like maybe a bottle opener in the room   We arrived over an hour before scheduled check in but that was no problem We had also requested a room with a view and we could not have been happier Top floor with the river and city view fantastic 10 minute walk to the Metro and Eiffel Tower

Air in rooms is very dry and stuffy Difficult to sleep because it was so dry The pillows were also not of the highest quality   The staff were friendly and helpful The check in was swift and efficient It went downhill from there
Men must wear a Speedo in order to use the pool So we did not use the pool What kind of rule is that No wonder the pool was empty   Great view of Paris Walking distance to the Eiffel tower

Had to change to a different room as the first we were given was on the 22nd floor had wet carpets and you could smell the damp I m not sure how long it had been empty but it must have been more than a couple of days Overall the carpets in both rooms as well as the corridors looked a bit worn dirty and in need of replacing Toilet was separate from bathroom and not ideal   Room generally nice with a very comfy bed memory foam mattress and clean bathroom Sofa bed for the kids OK Hotel is in a great location with friendly staff and about 15 minutes walk from the Eiffel Tower Good breakfast worth paying extra as we had kids with us Overall very nice

The pool was closed The reception was very slow and unfriendly on both check in and check out The concierge was closed from 6 30pm When we called reception from the room the phone was just left to ring we saw reception also ignoring calls when we were checking out The escalators didn t work the phone chargers in reception didn t work the room was damp with paint coming off the walls The walls were thin and we could hear next door even though they weren t noisy

The location is OK good for tourists who want the Eifel Tower right around the corner But always consider some 15 20 walking to the next Metro station and some changing to get to places like Louvre Hotel de Ville and so on Annoying was the noise and bass from the club or whatever on saturday night at 3am that was bothering I tried to call the reception twice for some other reasons and never got an answer Furthermore the staff at the reception always seemed a little overwhelmed and too busy At check out they were not responsive at all to my attempt to complain about the nightly club noise   It was a decent room nothing special not bad but also not spectecular

The houskeeping not accounting for number of guests in the room not putting any shower gel or shampoo Even when i complained they sent me 1 bottle of each It was a family suite we were 4   The space of the room that accomodated my family not common for paris
The shower was leaked and I ask them to look 3 times and always tell me they send the technician to fix but every when I get back the shower was the same   They have a good breakfast

I didn t like the fact that hotel staff charged my credit card before I actually arrived to the desk I didn t had that card with me and there was a problem First of all I want to have a full control over MY cards and hand permissions myself I wasn t late This never happened to me before hotels usually wait for customer arrival And I DO ALWAYS USE different cards for safety reasons But thankfully it was sorted smoothly Paris some tourist areas is being close between 14 18 on Sunday for car traffic Which blocks all town Avoid those hours to drive   Very Good centre location Walking distance to The Tower Loads of tourist attractions available in the doorstep Seems to be very safe area Excellent food and service in downstairs coffee

The only area needing improvement was the consistency of the maid service The room was always clean but the coffee service items varied as did the water bottle we should have received each day instead of only on the first day   The staff was very accommodating and supportive The location was great The room was very comfortable
The bed was extremely uncomfortable Selection of television channels could have been better with more english available   Great location and staff were fantastic

The breakfast was somewhat dry I asked for an iron and it came after 1 hour There was no lock to the toilet door and for the family of three this is needed   I like the bed the TV the play thing for kids in the lobby the friendliness of the staff and location of the hotel

Fruit at breakfast not much selections and kids did not like No extra pillows with cover for kids sleeping on sofa bed   Separate toilet TV Gift shop on site Parking on site Good location Friendly and helpful staff at reception

Checking in took an hour and a half as the Receptionist was trying to tell us that they had no notification of the 10 rooms we booked via Booking com They then found it and slowly checked everyone in They then tried to tell us that they had no booking for a table for 22 for dinner which was prepaid in full A very tiresome person who was very unhelpful and let the hotel down Breakfast too again was fraught as Booking com gave no option to book for breakfast so we came down expecting to pay and was met with the same sullen faces who eventually found somewhere for our people to sit and take breakfast The hotel was great in all other aspects once you get past the staff

No comment there r many   Break fast is not at all good for an Indian Costomer Rooms are good but house keeping is not up to the mark as they have not changed toiletery as soap shampoo body wash rtf There were no glass for drinking water the glass which they have kept were disposal Now tell me one thing paying so much amount for room what the service they give In short we can say nothing But overall the Person who checked in me was superb

We can t window open But hotel is so high   That was amazing trip Hotel is very good for us a lot of smile and nice people who work there We have got amazing view from our window at the photo We live at 31 floor

Cleaners are just available in the morning Novotel Cafe s Caesar Salad is very salty we order 3 plates but wasn t able to finish they put too much salt and it tasted horrible We try to tell them but the chinky eyed waitress just ignored us We ended just eating bread in the hotel room We avoided lunch and dinner in this restaurant from then on   Reception Staff and Concierge are very helpful Cleaners ignore our request to clean the toilet after the plumber had fixed the blocked toilet

When we opened the curtains in our room WOW what a fantastic view of the seine The room was clean and the bed very comfortable we liked that our 15 year old daughter was just out of view around the corner giving her the privacy she needed Highly recommended would stay again

The reception area is spacious modern and the staff welcoming The rooms are a different story altogether We were a family of four the first room smelt of cigarettes We were moved to an alternate room The carpet was heavily stained and old pieces of fruit grapes and apples under the bed was disgusting The bathroom was appalling mould on the ceiling the mirror was falling off the wall the shower door closed but when you had a shower the water leaked to leave the bathroom like a swimming pool The rooms in this hotel are in need of some serious modernisation   The hotels location is fantastic A twenty minute walk to the Eiffel Tower Five minute walk to two metro stations and multiple shops and restaurants It is easy to get anywhere in Paris from this hotel

Perhaps the swimming pool could be improved by having more relaxed rules I e Not having to wear swimming hats Overall there was nothing that we didn t like though   The property was absolutely amazing We stayed on the 30th floor in a room with a wonderful view The staff were very helpful and welcoming and the room was very clean I will definitely come back as the location is great very central around 8min walk to the Eiffel Tower and right next to a shopping centre I wish I could go back right now
